mission: Legacy cleanup and release redefinition — remove inconsistencies and dead code across the codebase, unify agent naming to underscores, flatten existing tags to v0.x.y, bump protocol to v1, and create CHANGELOG
done_when: All legacy remnants removed, naming unified, tags flattened, protocol v1, and CHANGELOG created

in: Remove stale references and dead code in skills, agents, and protocol docs
Unify agent filenames to underscore format (product_authority.md etc.)
Unify agent names in skill text Agent() calls and protocol prose to underscores
Fix CLI bugs (evolution.ts missing cwd) and clean dead code
Remove v3-era no-op functions, stale fallback logic, duplicate functions
Flatten existing git tags to v0.x.y (v0.2.0->v0.1.0, v1.0.0->v0.2.0, etc.)
Update protocol INDEX version to v1
out: Protocol content/structure changes (format and naming unification only)

acceptance_criteria: Agent filenames all use underscore format (product_authority.md)
All skills/protocol docs use underscore agent names consistently
evidence-gate undefined escalation policy cleaned up
CLI v3 no-op functions and stale fallback logic removed
Existing 8 git tags flattened to v0.x.y
CHANGELOG.md exists with full release history
constraints: Schema agent name enum values already use underscores - no change needed
Do not change protocol content/structure - format only
risk_notes: Agent filename changes may cause plugin.json registration mismatch
Tag flattening requires remote force push - affects collaborators
Naming unification may miss some references
assumptions: Remote tags will also be changed (force push required)
Current main branch is up to date
